# ProcessReporter v1.6.0

## Highlights

- Adds automatic and manual Sparkle updates backed by a universal macOS release feed.
- Protects Mix Space, Slack, and S3 credentials outside plaintext preferences, with migration and recovery paths that pause reporting when the credential store cannot be trusted.
- Keeps media-only reporting active without Accessibility access or a readable focused window.

## Fixes and reliability

- Serializes report preparation and delivery, cancels stale work across disable, sleep, and termination boundaries, and records history only for integrations that confirmed success.
- Makes database retention, settings imports, and credential changes transactional so failures preserve existing data and configuration.
- Corrects Slack token rotation and status-clearing order, Discord stale activity cleanup, S3 endpoint validation and signing, and media monitoring recovery after sleep or stale streams.
- Prevents concurrent ProcessReporter instances from competing for local persistence and integration state.

## Update notes

- Existing integration credentials are migrated out of legacy preferences on first launch. If protected credential recovery fails, reporting remains paused until the store is recovered or reset.
- This release adds the Sparkle feed used by future in-app updates.
